name: listActorKeys
_note: federation.listActorKeys (LENS_ACTIONS, not MACROS) lists the caller's registered signed-actor keys with rotation state. The raw publicKey is NOT included in the listing projection (only the deterministic fingerprint) — defense against leaking key material to the UI. verified counts only entries whose last verifyActorSignature succeeded. Returns ok:true with empty entries for a fresh actor — pure in-memory, per-user, never no_db.
